features: WHAT YOU'LL GET: Includes three (3) Colgate Max White toothbrushes with polishing star, medium bristles, and assorted designs for everyday brushing
COLGATE WHITENING TOOTHBRUSHES: Use this Colgate toothbrush for a clean mouth, including teeth, gums, and tongue
POLISHING TOOTHBRUSH: Specially designed bristles get in hard-to-reach places, while the unique polishing star helps to whiten teeth by removing surface stains
STYLISH AND COMFORTABLE DESIGN: Ergonomic handle is made for comfort, and the appealing colours and simple designs can go with any bathroom decor or style
TONGUE BRUSHER: The integrated tongue cleaner on this toothbrush helps remove bacteria that cause bad breath, so you can have a fresher mouth
Colgate, #1 Dentist Recommended Brand Colgate Brand, Toothpaste, UK, Dentist
Colgate, #1 Dentist Recommended Brand* *Colgate Brand, Toothpaste, UK, Dentist
description: Product Description Give your smile extra dazzle with the Colgate Max White Medium whitening toothbrushes. These teeth whitening toothbrushes have a unique polishing star that helps to whiten teeth by removing surface stains and specially designed bristles to clean hard to reach places. What’s more, the whitening toothbrushes have an ergonomic handle designed to comfort. Now you can smile with absolute confidence by revealing your teeth’s natural whiteness with these whitening toothbrushes. Ingredients Contains 3 Colgate Max White Medium Whitening Toothbrushes Directions Dentists and hygienists recommend replacing your toothbrush every 3 months. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. Do not use as a toy. Keep out of reach of children. Do not swallow brush timer parts. Manufacturer Contact Information Guildford Business Park Guildford GU2 8XG See more
